GoalOS AGIJobManagerPublic Proof Institution
ConciergeCommand CenterTrustEvidenceSettlementArchitectureLegalInstitution
Start here · one proof path · no wallet

Understand the institution
in five minutes.

GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension is a public-safe proof institution. Start with the trust equation, build an Evidence Docket, run the settlement lifecycle, then stop at human review.

Open Concierge →Run Trust EquationBuild Evidence DocketRun Settlement Lifecycle

No account. No forms. No wallet. No network request. No analytics. No cookies. No storage. No production authority. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed, or private-key information.

Best first path

A model answers. An institution proves.

Trust Equation

See why proof-zero makes trusted institutional work zero.

Evidence Docket Composer

Build the proof room before the claim.

Proof-Settlement Lifecycle

Request → Escrow → Execute → Proof → Validate → Settle → Chronicle.

Command Center

Search every route without a crowded header.

Best demonstrations

Proof first. Then action.

Core ideaProof Gradient ArenaScore is advisory; gates are mandatory.Core ideaProof-to-Action TheatreThe shortest demonstration of output becoming proof-backed decision state.Core ideaTrust Equation SimulatorShows why proof, validation, settlement, and reuse turn output into trusted work.Core ideaUntil-DONE Mission ControlObjective → Mission Contract → Evidence Docket → Governed Decision State → DONE.Evidence & claimsClaim Boundary FirewallPromote, revise, quarantine, or reject public claims based on evidence.Evidence & claimsEvidence Docket ComposerBuild the proof room before the claim.Evidence & claimsEvidence RoomPersistent evidence entrypoint and public-safe proof context.Evidence & claimsReplay & Falsification GauntletA proof that cannot be challenged is not ready for stronger claims.Work economyAscension Inflow ControlVerified work survives inside the governed band of compute, data, tasks, incentives, feedback, governance, and tools.Work economyMandateEpoch ClearinghouseMany proof receipts clear through roots, challenge windows, and Chronicle handoff.Work economyProof-Settlement LifecycleRequest → Escrow → Execute → Proof → Validate → Settle → Chronicle.Work economyReal-Task Benchmark BridgePublic claims must pass real-task baselines and benchmark evidence.
Public-safe

Default deny

Public demos are read-only simulations and local receipt generators. They do not authorize funds or broadcast transactions.

Human boundary

No authority self-granted

Every public path stops at review, claim boundary, or expert-only separation.

Proof object

Export a receipt

Demos emit public-safe JSON receipts for review, replay concepts, and documentation.

Loop Operating Room

Run a browser-local GoalOS loop: contract, roles, traces, restarts, scoring, Evidence Docket, Chronicle, and bottleneck visibility.

From Loop to RSI
